Ray — great speaking with you. With 26 properties under management and two more coming online this spring, your team is facing recurring electricity setup, service transfers, and pricing exposure across the portfolio. Nodal Point was built specifically for this challenge.

Option 01
Self-Managed Broker Portal
Get direct access to all suppliers in one view. Compare live rates, send Electric Service Agreements, and earn a referral fee on every deal you close — all from one portal.
Option 02
Refer It, Earn a Fee
Prefer zero lift? Send us the lead and we handle everything — rate shopping, the agreement, and full setup. You collect a referral fee when the deal closes.
Both models apply to your full portfolio — vacant buildings ready for setup, occupied units approaching renewal, and incoming tenants who need service from day one.

OPTION 01
Self-Managed Portal Access
Handle It Yourself —
Broker Portal

FORUM gets its own broker portal — the same tool professional energy brokers use daily. Log in, enter the address, and see real-time rates from all major suppliers side by side. Select the best price per kWh and send the Electric Service Agreement directly to the tenant or owner. You control the timeline, the vendor, and the deal — and earn a referral fee every time.

How It Works
  • 01Property turns over or new tenant moves in
  • 02Log into your Nodal Point broker portal
  • 03Enter the property address and load info
  • 04Compare live rates — all suppliers, one view
  • 05Send the ESA directly to the tenant or owner
  • 06Deal closes → referral fee earned
What You Get
  • All supplier rates in one view
  • Best price per kWh — no shopping around
  • Send agreements direct to tenants
  • Full visibility across your whole portfolio
  • You control the timeline — no middleman
  • Passive income on every deal closed
Live Portal Preview
Real rates · All suppliers · One screen

Real-time rates from APG&E, Atlantic Energy, Constellation, ENGIE, Freepoint, Gexa and more — all in one view

OPTION 02
Zero-Lift Referral Model
Refer It to Us — Earn a Fee

Prefer to keep it simple? Just send us the lead. When a property turns over or a tenant needs electricity set up, hand it off to our team. We handle all the rate shopping, the service agreement, and the full setup — you earn a referral fee when the deal closes. Zero time, zero effort, zero risk.

How It Works
  • 01You notify us of a vacancy or incoming tenant
  • 02We contact the landlord or tenant directly
  • 03Our team finds the best rate and manages setup
  • 04ESA is signed, electricity goes live
  • 05You receive your referral fee
What You Get
  • Zero time or effort from your team
  • Referral fee on every completed deal
  • Tenants get better rates than going direct
  • Trusted vendor on your approved list
  • No contracts or commitments required
  • We handle compliance and all paperwork
At a Glance
Option 01 — Self-Managed Portal Option 02 — Refer & Earn
ControlFull — you manage the portalHanded off to Nodal Point
Time Required~10 min per propertyOne referral call or email
RevenueReferral fee per deal closedReferral fee per deal closed
Effort LevelLow — portal is intuitiveMinimal — just the intro
Best ForTeams who want full visibilityTeams who want zero lift
